headline: Your international group sales team — without the extra headcount.
lede: We represent your hotel in key leisure source markets, negotiate and qualify every request, and act like an in-house sales team. You always keep full control over pricing and acceptance.
cta2_label: See if your hotel is a fit →
s2_body: Hotels without a group focus lose structural market share. Leisure groups are the quiet engine behind base occupancy.
s2_checklist: All-year coverage, not just peak season
role_checklist: We represent your hotel in key leisure source markets
We negotiate and qualify requests on your behalf
We act with the mindset of an in-house sales team
You maintain full control over pricing and acceptance
20+ years of experience with key leisure players — the right contacts, already in place
No cure, no pay — you only pay for results
Represented at major industry fairs and trade events

steps.title: Understand
steps.body: We understand your positioning, target markets and priorities.

steps.title: Agree
steps.body: We agree on indication rates, communication flows & guidelines.

steps.title: Sell
steps.body: We activate demand and match the right business to your hotel.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Optimised pipeline, predictable conversions, continuous growth.

fit_checklist: Ambition to grow an international leisure base
testimonial_quote: "We've kept full control over our rates and acceptance criteria from day one — Stream2 simply brings us the right groups, at the right time. It feels like having our own international sales desk, without the overhead."
cta_heading: Let's talk about your hotel's group strategy.
